channel.title: Braindumps on low-level-luke
channel.description: Recent content in Braindumps on low-level-luke

item.title: Two-Phase Locking (2PL)
item.description: How two-phase locking controls concurrent transactions, and what I got wrong along the way

item.title: Database Concurrency Models
item.description: How databases handle multiple clients at once, and what I got wrong along the way

item.title: Paxos
item.description: How Paxos coordinates state across machines, and what I got wrong along the way

item.title: Linearizability
item.description: What linearizability means in distributed systems, and what I got wrong along the way

item.title: SQLite Query Execution
item.description: How SQLite processes a query from SQL text to results, and what I got wrong along the way

item.title: Log-Structured Merge Trees
item.description: How LSM trees trade read performance for fast writes, and what I got wrong along the way
